name: claude-code-fsharp-lsp
description: F# code intelligence for Claude Code via fsautocomplete (FSAC).

plugins.name: fsharp-lsp
plugins.description: Registers fsautocomplete (FSAC) for .fs/.fsi/.fsx, so Claude Code's LSP tool works on F#: goToDefinition, hover, findReferences, call hierarchy. There is no official F# plugin; this is it.
